name: Wild Duck and Andouille Sauce Piquant
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Andouille, sliced into 1/4"- thick strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the wild duck breasts in some olive oil.
2. Make a roux with the olive oil and flour (see Justin's recipe posted earlier).
3. Add chopped onions, bell pepper, green onions, and parsley to the roux. Stir and cook.
4. Add one cup water and finely chopped garlic. Cook until absorbed.
5. Add Chablis wine and more water. Stir in Lea & Perrins, Louisiana hot sauce, salt, and parsley.
6. Mix well and add the Andouille (or smoked sausage) to the sauce. Stir.
7. Place duck breasts into the sauce and simmer on low heat for 3 to 4 hours, stirring occasionally.
8. Adjust seasoning with additional salt and cayenne pepper as desired.
9. Serve over spaghetti or rice.
